config.name: akamai_sitedefender-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: akamai_sitedefender-latest 
-- OCSF Class: HTTP Activity (4002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:13:21.813263

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local PATTERNS = {
    ip = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$",
    method = "^[A-Z]+$"
}

-- Cached references for performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local ipairs = ipairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local references
    local output = {
        -- Core OCSF fields
        class_uid = 4002,
        class_name = "HTTP Activity", 
        category_uid = 2,
        category_name = "Findings",
        type_uid = 400201,
        
        -- Initialize nested structures
        src_endpoint = {},
        http_request = {
            url = {}
        },
        http_response = {},
        metadata = {
            product = {}
        }
    }

    -- Safe table accessor helper
    local function get_nested(t, ...)
        local current = t
        for _, k in ipairs({...}) do
            if type(current) ~= "table" then return nil end
            current = current[k]
        end
        return current
    end

    -- Process attack data
    local attack_data = record.attackData
    if type(attack_data) == "table" then
        -- Client IP validation and assignment
        local client_ip = attack_data.clientIP
        if client_ip and type(client_ip) == "string" and client_ip:match(PATTERNS.ip) then
            output.src_endpoint.ip = client_ip
        end

        -- Config and Policy IDs
        output.metadata.correlation_uid = attack_data.configId
        output.policy = {name = attack_data.policyId}

        -- Process rules array
        local rules = attack_data.rules
        if type(rules) == "table" then
            local observables = {}
            local rule_actions = {}
            local messages = {}
            
            for _, rule in ipairs(rules) do
                if type(rule) == "table" then
                    table.insert(observables, string_format("Rule: %s", rule.rule or "unknown"))
                    table.insert(rule_actions, rule.ruleAction)
                    table.insert(messages, rule.ruleMessage)
                end
            end
            
            output.observables = observables
            output.disposition = rule_actions[1] -- Take first action
            output.message = table.concat(messages, "; ")
            
            -- Set activity and severity based on rule action
            if rule_actions[1] == "BLOCK" then
                output.activity_id = 2
                output.activity_name = "Access Denied"
                output.severity_id = 3
                output.severity = "High"
            elseif rule_actions[1] == "ALERT" then
                output.activity_id = 1
                output.activity_name = "Access Granted" 
                output.severity_id = 2
                output.severity = "Medium"
            else
                output.activity_id = 99
                output.activity_name = "Other"
                output.severity_id = 1
                output.severity = "Low"
            end
        end
    end

    -- Process HTTP message data
    local http = record.httpMessage
    if type(http) == "table" then
        -- Validate and assign HTTP method
        local method = http.method
        if method and type(method) == "string" and method:match(PATTERNS.method) then
            output.http_request.http_method = method
        end
        
        output.http_request.url.hostname = http.host
        output.http_request.url.path = http.path
        output.http_response.code = tonumber(http.status)
    end

    -- Process geolocation
    local geo = record.geo
    if type(geo) == "table" then
        output.src_endpoint.location = {
            city = geo.city,
            country = geo.country
        }
    end

    -- Process risk data
    local risk = get_nested(record, "userRiskData", "botScore")
    if type(risk) == "number" then
        output.risk_score = risk
    end

    -- Set timestamp
    output.time = record.time or (os_time() * 1000)

    -- Final validation
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end
